test_output_summary: 57 passed in 1.81s (31 pre-existing + 26 new for local inference provider fields)
implementation_notes: Added 5 new fields to GraphitiSettings dataclass: llm_provider (str, default 'openai'), llm_base_url (Optional[str], default None), llm_model (Optional[str], default None), embedding_provider (str, default 'openai'), embedding_base_url (Optional[str], default None). Validation in __post_init__ checks llm_provider and embedding_provider are one of ('openai', 'vllm', 'ollama') and type-checks all new fields. load_graphiti_config() updated with defaults, field_types for YAML loading, and env_overrides for 5 new env vars (LLM_PROVIDER, LLM_BASE_URL, LLM_MODEL, EMBEDDING_PROVIDER, EMBEDDING_BASE_URL). Empty string is treated as None for all Optional fields (llm_base_url, llm_model, embedding_base_url) in both YAML and env var paths. The graphiti.yaml updated to add new fields before group_ids with descriptive comments; embedding_model comment updated to mention provider support.
requirements_addressed: Added llm_provider, llm_base_url, llm_model, embedding_provider, embedding_base_url fields to GraphitiSettings
Provider validation: must be one of 'openai', 'vllm', 'ollama'
Type validation for all new fields
load_graphiti_config() reads new fields from YAML with type coercion
load_graphiti_config() supports env var overrides: LLM_PROVIDER, LLM_BASE_URL, LLM_MODEL, EMBEDDING_PROVIDER, EMBEDDING_BASE_URL
Empty string treated as None for Optional fields (llm_base_url, llm_model, embedding_base_url)
Backward compatibility: YAML files without new fields default to 'openai' providers and None for URLs/models
All 31 pre-existing tests continue to pass
Updated .guardkit/graphiti.yaml with new provider fields and descriptive comments
Updated module docstring to document new environment variables
